original_prompt: 给这个和田玉手串做一张淘宝主图，要求绸缎面的白色布为主色并且添加一下元素充实画面
optimized_prompt:
[Visual Description]
"Modern Chinese E-commerce Jewelry scene, Premium Commercial Studio Photography style. A minimalist ring of highly polished, semi-translucent pale green spherical beads (resembling Hetian jade) lies gently in the Center. 
[Props]: The product rests on luxurious, flowing white silk satin cloth with elegant folds. Subtle accents like a small white porcelain teacup or a single green leaf are placed in the background to add depth without distraction.
[Background]: Soft white silk fabric filling the frame, creating a clean, high-key atmosphere.
Lighting is Studio Softbox with a reflector to enhance the vitreous finish and subsurface scattering (SSS) of the beads, ensuring sharp specular highlights."

[Text & UI Layout]
"***Layout Style**: Top-Bottom Standard.
Text Rendering Instructions (Must be High Contrast & Legible):
1. **Main Title**: Content: “温润如玉”. Position: Top Right Negative Space. Style: 3D Bold Serif font (Songti) with soft gold shadow. Color: Deep Emerald Green.
2. **Sub Title**: Content: “和田玉料 · 细腻油润”. Style: Clean and sharp, slightly smaller than main title, dark grey.
3. **Marketing Banner**: Content: “甄选好料”. Style: Minimalist Gold Line Border Capsule.
4. **Trust Badge**: Content: “国检证书”. Style: Translucent Glass Badge with Gold Rim."
layout_logic:
Suggestions:
1. **Fabric Texture**: The white silk background is high-key. To make the text pop, place the text in an area where the fabric shadow is slightly deeper or use a dark font color (Deep Green/Black).
2. **Product Position**: Keep the bracelet centered or slightly lower-center to allow ample 'breathing room' at the top for the main title.
3. **Lighting**: Ensure the 'gloss' (highlights) on the beads faces the same direction as the light source on the silk folds for realism.
